title: Creeper Cannon DataPack
description: [​This DataPack Adds A Small Cannon That Shoots Creepers, Shoot At The Ground Or Mobs]
body:
[​This DataPack Adds A Small Cannon That Shoots Creepers, Shoot At The Ground Or Mobs]
- With This Data Pack All New Players In The World Will Spawn With An Creeper Spawn Egg.

to use the cannon just right-click it and it will fire, and it takes a few seconds to reload you have to hold the cannon for it to reload.

This Was Simple To Make So Injoy Everyone :)

Functions:
creeper_cannon:give
